title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
